CheckTitle: Ensure fewer than 5 users have the Global Administrator role
Description: Checks that the number of permanent Global Administrator role assignments does not exceed the recommended maximum. Microsoft and CIS recommend no more than 4 Global Administrators.
Risk: Every Global Administrator has unrestricted access to all tenant settings and data. Excessive Global Admins expand the attack surface and violate least-privilege principles. A compromised Global Admin account grants total tenant control.

Remediation.Recommendation: Reduce the number of permanent Global Administrator assignments to 4 or fewer. Use Privileged Identity Management (PIM) for just-in-time activation. Assign more specific admin roles (Exchange Admin, SharePoint Admin, etc.) where possible.

Frameworks.source: AI-generated mapping — not yet verified against published benchmark
